title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DTDC

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DTDC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!
